title: coleus hadiensis
intro: Coleus hadiensis, also known as Coleus forskohlii, is a tropical plant native to India and parts of Africa, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of forskolin, a compound that has been studied for its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Coleus hadiensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in weight loss, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is traditionally prepared as a herbal remedy, often in the form of a tea or capsule, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
